title: fragaria vesca f. crenata
intro: Fragaria vesca f. crenata, also known as the woodland strawberry or crenated wood strawberry, is a subspecies of the wild strawberry plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanin content, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca f. crenata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various conditions. Fragaria vesca f. crenata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
